title: Los Patos y Las Patas
overview: Tomás is 40 years old and recently got divorced a few months ago. Romina, the love of his teenage years, has returned to Lima, bringing back memories of that fleeting high school romance. However, an old Walkman gives him the chance to go back to the past and try to fix the mistakes that could change his destiny.
